sources.name: xianyu_search_python_automation_real

page_actions.script: () => { const clickIfVisible = (selector) => { const node = document.querySelector(selector); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); return true; } return false; }; const selectors = ['.ant-modal-close', '[class*="closeIcon"]', '[class*="close-icon"]', '[aria-label="Close"]']; for (const selector of selectors) { clickIfVisible(selector); } const blockers = ['.ant-modal-root', '[class*="login-iframe-wrap"]', '#xy-login-iframe']; for (const selector of blockers) { for (const node of document.querySelectorAll(selector)) { if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.style.display = 'none'; node.remove(); } } } for (const node of document.querySelectorAll('.ant-modal-mask')) { if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.style.display = 'none'; node.remove(); } } if (document.body instanceof HTMLElement) { document.body.style.overflow = 'auto'; } return document.querySelectorAll('[class*="feeds-item-wrap"]').length; }

sources.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const cardSelector = '[class*="feeds-item-wrap"]'; const anchors = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="goofish.com/item?id="], a[href*="/item?id="], a[href*="item?id="]')); const candidates = anchors.length ? anchors : Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(cardSelector)); const seen = new Set(); return candidates.map((node) => { const anchor = node instanceof HTMLAnchorElement ? node : node.querySelector('a[href]'); const card = (node instanceof HTMLElement ? node.closest(cardSelector) || node : null) || (anchor ? anchor.closest(cardSelector) : null) || anchor; if (!card) return null; const url = anchor ? toAbsoluteUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href || '') : ''; const title = normalize((card.querySelector('[class*="main-title"]') || anchor || card).textContent); const priceText = normalize((card.querySelector('[class*="price-wrap"]') || {}).textContent || ''); const sellerParts = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('[class*="seller-text"]')).map((item) => normalize(item.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const tagParts = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('[class*="cpv"], [class*="service"], [class*="price-desc"], [class*="recommend-reason"]')).map((item) => normalize(item.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const summary = normalize(card.innerText); return { title, url, priceText, sellerName: sellerParts.join(' / '), cityName: sellerParts[0] || '', tags: tagParts.join(' / '), summary }; }).filter((item) => item && item.title && item.url && /\/item\?id=/.test(item.url) && !seen.has(item.url) && seen.add(item.url)); }
